title: Acme HVAC — Voice Agent Pilot Proposal

sections.executive_summary: Acme HVAC currently misses 22% of after-hours calls, with 40% of those callers not returning the next day. We propose a 90-day pilot of a Sarah-class voice agent that answers after-hours, gathers caller details, classifies urgency, and pages the on-call technician. Expected outcome: recover 60% of missed calls and reduce voicemail backlog to under 10 per week.
scope: After-hours voice agent provisioning on existing Twilio number
Integration with HouseCallPro for dispatch context
On-call SMS routing with urgency tagging
Operator dashboard for review of all overnight calls
30-day post-launch tuning and weekly eval reports
deliverables: Two-week tuning window with daily eval reports

timeline.weeks_1_2: Discovery, eval scenario authoring, agent configuration

_demo_note: Synthetic proposal output — fictional client, fictional pricing.
